title: CampaignPriceLimits
description: Controls which campaign prices the promotion UI will accept or warn about.

maxDiscountPercent.description: Maximum allowed discount as a percentage of the item's current price (0–100).

maxDiscountPercentSeverity.description: Whether exceeding maxDiscountPercent is a hard block or a soft warning.

minMarginPercent.description: Minimum required margin as a percentage above purchase price. E.g. 10 means campaign price must be ≥ purchasePrice × 1.10.

minMarginPercentSeverity.description: Whether violating minMarginPercent is a hard block or a soft warning.
